% fig_lec03_smoothmap.tex — Smooth map f : M → M' and its chart representative
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec03_charts.jl
%
% Taking M = M' = {z = h(x,y)} and  f̂(u,v) = (u + 0.3·sin(0.8·v), v + 0.25·sin(0.5·u))
% at the chart level, the diagram shows:
%   f : O_α ⊂ M   →   f(O_α) ⊂ M' = M
%   ψ_α : O_α → U_α ⊂ R²
%   ψ'_β : f(O_α) → U'_β ⊂ R²
%   ψ'_β ∘ f ∘ ψ_α⁻¹ = f̂ : U_α → U'_β   (smooth)

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \pgfplotsset{
    colormap={cgbluetint}{rgb255(0cm)=(210,224,240) rgb255(1cm)=(112,156,200)},
    colormap={munselltint}{rgb255(0cm)=(216,232,224) rgb255(1cm)=(120,160,138)},
  }

  % ── TOP LEFT: M with O_α and p ─────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=M,
      width=6.6cm, height=4.8cm,
      view={-28}{35},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none, xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.28, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_surface.dat};
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.55, shader=interp,
              colormap name=cgbluetint, mesh/rows=18, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_Oalpha_patch.dat};
    \addplot3[cgblue, line width=1.2pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_Oalpha_boundary.dat};
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_point_p_M.dat};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet] at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\small, text=cgblue] at (axis cs:0.2,0.8,0.75) {$O_\alpha$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black] at (axis cs:1.25,-0.1,0.32) {$p$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── TOP RIGHT: M' with f(O_α) and f(p) ────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=Mp,
      at={($(M.east)+(2.6cm,0)$)}, anchor=west,
      width=6.6cm, height=4.8cm,
      view={-28}{35},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none, xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.28, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_surface.dat};
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.55, shader=interp,
              colormap name=munselltint, mesh/rows=18, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_fOalpha_patch.dat};
    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.2pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_fOalpha_boundary.dat};
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_fp_M.dat};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet] at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M'$};
    \node[font=\small, text=munsell] at (axis cs:0.7,1.5,0.35) {$f(O_\alpha)$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black] at (axis cs:1.3,0.25,0.38) {$f(p)$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── BOTTOM LEFT: U_α ⊂ R² ─────────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=Ualpha,
      at={($(M.south)+(0,-1.1cm)$)}, anchor=north,
      width=4.0cm, height=4.0cm,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-1.4, xmax=2.6, ymin=-1.1, ymax=1.8,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot[fill=cgblue!15, draw=cgblue, line width=1.0pt, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_Ualpha_boundary.dat} \closedcycle;
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.5pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_point_p_alpha.dat};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange] at (axis cs:2.4,1.55) {$\Rn{n}$};
    \node[font=\small, text=cgblue] at (axis cs:0.5,0.3) {$U_\alpha$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── BOTTOM RIGHT: U'_β ⊂ R² ───────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=Upbeta,
      at={($(Mp.south)+(0,-1.1cm)$)}, anchor=north,
      width=4.0cm, height=4.0cm,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-1.4, xmax=2.6, ymin=-1.1, ymax=1.8,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot[fill=munsell!15, draw=munsell, line width=1.0pt, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_fUalpha_boundary.dat} \closedcycle;
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.5pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_fp_alpha.dat};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange] at (axis cs:2.4,1.55) {$\Rn{n'}$};
    \node[font=\small, text=munsell] at (axis cs:0.9,0.6) {$U'_\beta$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── Arrows ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  % f : M → M'
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=7pt,width=4pt]}, spacecadet]
    ($(M.east)+(0.05,0)$) -- ($(Mp.west)+(-0.05,0)$)
    node[midway, above, font=\small, text=spacecadet]{$f$};

  % ψ_α down
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=6pt,width=3.5pt]}, cgblue]
    ($(M.south)+(0,-0.1)$) -- ($(Ualpha.north)+(0,0.1)$)
    node[midway, left, font=\small, text=cgblue, xshift=-2pt]{$\psi_\alpha$};

  % ψ'_β down
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=6pt,width=3.5pt]}, munsell]
    ($(Mp.south)+(0,-0.1)$) -- ($(Upbeta.north)+(0,0.1)$)
    node[midway, right, font=\small, text=munsell, xshift=2pt]{$\psi'_\beta$};

  % composite ψ'_β ∘ f ∘ ψ_α⁻¹
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=6pt,width=3.5pt]}, spacecadet]
    ($(Ualpha.east)+(0.05,0)$) -- ($(Upbeta.west)+(-0.05,0)$)
    node[midway, below=1pt, font=\scriptsize, text=spacecadet]
      {$\psi'_\beta\circ f\circ\psi_\alpha^{-1}$};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
